actor_relation_claims.quote_text: our financial advisor, BMO Capital Markets Corp., which we refer to as “BMO,” rendered to the Board its oral opinion
each of the Company’s executive officers (other than Robert H. Eder, our Chief Executive Officer) is party to a change in control agreement with the Company
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: executive officers party to change in control agreement
actor_relation_claims.subject_label: Company executive officers other than Robert H. Eder

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: The merger agreement also provides that the Company’s executive officers immediately prior to the effective time of the merger (excluding our Chief Executive Officer) will remain in office following the merger until their successors are duly elected or appointed and qualified.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: executive officers remain in office following the merger until successors are elected or appointed and qualified
actor_relation_claims.subject_label: Company executive officers excluding the Chief Executive Officer

event_claims.description: Company directors and executive officers may be deemed to have merger interests different from or in addition to shareholders generally, potentially creating conflicts of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: Company directors and executive officers may be deemed to have interests in the merger that are different from, or in addition to, the interests of the Company’s shareholders generally and which may create potential conflicts of interest

event_claims.description: The Board was aware of and considered these interests when determining to approve the merger agreement and recommend shareholder approval.
event_claims.quote_text: The members of the Board were aware of and considered these interests in reaching the determination to approve the merger agreement and deem the merger agreement, the merger and the other transactions contemplated by the merger agreement to be advisable and in the best interests of the Company, and in recommending that the Company’s shareholders vote for the approval of the merger agreement.

event_claims.description: BMO rendered its oral fairness opinion to the Board at the August 12, 2016 Board meeting, later confirmed in writing.
event_claims.quote_text: In connection with the merger, at the meeting of the Board on August 12, 2016, our financial advisor, BMO Capital Markets Corp., which we refer to as “BMO,” rendered to the Board its oral opinion, subsequently confirmed by delivery of a written opinion dated August 12, 2016
